business.name: Sunshine State Soft Wash
business.tagline: Bringing back the shine, one wash at a time

hero.headline: Your roof looks *brand new* — neighbors are gonna ask
hero.subheadline: Melbourne's soft wash pros who show up early and leave your property looking like you just moved in.

services_section.label: THE WASH
services_section.heading: Every surface, every stain, every time
services_section.subheading: From moldy roofs to stained driveways — we bring it all back to life

services.title: Soft Wash Roof Cleaning
services.description: Gentle, effective cleaning that removes mold and stains without damaging shingles. Your roof will look brand new.

services.title: Driveway & Walkway Cleaning
services.description: Blast away oil stains, mold, and grime. Transform cracked concrete into surfaces that look freshly poured.

services.title: House Exterior Washing
services.description: Complete home exterior cleaning that removes years of buildup. Siding, trim, and outdoor surfaces restored.

services.title: Commercial Property Cleaning
services.description: Keep your business looking professional with regular exterior maintenance and pressure washing services.

about.heading: Melbourne's trusted wash crew
about.body: We're the team your neighbors call when they want their property to look like new. Real pros, fair quotes, outstanding results.

reviews.name: Robert
reviews.text: Ben and his crew did an amazing job on our house and driveway. Very friendly, easy to schedule, and the finished product looked new. Can't believe how clean our roof looks.

reviews.name: Donna P.
reviews.text: So professional and did a great job. Fair quote and very happy with the work on my walkways and driveway. Photos don't do justice to the transformation.

reviews.name: TunedF82
reviews.text: Tremendous job soft washing our roof. Benjamin and his partner were friendly and easy going. Quality work made a huge difference — roof looks brand new.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Melbourne and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional soft wash and pressure cleaning throughout Brevard County

cta.heading: Ready for that brand-new look?
cta.body: Join 130+ happy Melbourne homeowners. Free quotes, fair pricing, and results that make your neighbors jealous.
